---
pagetitle: "The AI Engineering Blueprint"
title: "The AI Engineering Blueprint"
subtitle: "A blueprint for teaching the first principles of AI systems engineering"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Page Title Styling ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
#title-block-header {
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  padding-bottom: 0 !important;
}
#title-block-header .title {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif !important;
  font-size: 2.2rem !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  border: none !important;
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem !important;
}
#title-block-header .subtitle {
  font-size: 1.05rem !important;
  color: #64748b !important;
  font-weight: 400 !important;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem !important;
}

/* ── Hero Band with numbers integrated ────────────────────────────── */
.hero-band {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0a0f 0%, #1a1a2a 100%);
  padding: 2.5rem 2rem 1.5rem;
  color: #e8e8f0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2a3a;
  margin-top: -1rem;
}
.hero-inner {
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.hero-top {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 2.5rem;
}
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .hero-top { flex-direction: column; }
}
.hero-text {
  flex: 1;
}
.hero-text h1 {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.hero-text h1 em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: #818cf8;
}
.hero-text .hero-desc {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #9090a0;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
}
.hero-meta {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.hero-meta a {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.45rem 1.1rem;
  border-radius: 7px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.hero-meta .btn-start {
  background: #6366f1;
  color: white !important;
}
.hero-meta .btn-start:hover { background: #818cf8; }
.hero-meta .btn-syllabus {
  border: 1.5px solid #3a3a4a;
  color: #e8e8f0 !important;
}
.hero-meta .btn-syllabus:hover { border-color: #6366f1; color: #818cf8 !important; }
.hero-meta .cc-badge {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #555;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

/* ── Pillars (in hero, right side) ────────────────────────────────── */
.hero-pillars {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 0.6rem;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 260px;
}
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .hero-pillars { width: 100%; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
}
.hp {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0.75rem 0.5rem;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border-radius: 8px;
}
.hp-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; }
.hp-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #c8c8d8;
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}
.hp-sub {
  font-size: 0.6rem;
  color: #666;
  display: block;
}

/* ── Numbers (inside hero band) ───────────────────────────────────── */
.hero-numbers {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  padding-top: 1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #2a2a3a;
  text-align: center;
}
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .hero-numbers { flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .hero-numbers .hn { flex: 0 0 33%; }
}
.hn .hn-big {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #818cf8;
  display: block;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.hn .hn-label {
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  color: #666;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
}

/* ── Content Container ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hub-content {
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 1.5rem 4rem;
}

/* ── Section Headers (inventory) ──────────────────────────────────── */
.inv-header {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 2rem 0 0.75rem;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border-left: 4px solid #6366f1;
  border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0;
  color: #1a1a2e;
}

/* ── Inventory Table ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.inventory-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
}
.inventory-table td {
  padding: 0.65rem 0.75rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  vertical-align: top;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}
.inventory-table td:first-child {
  width: 160px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1a1a2e;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.inventory-table td:nth-child(2) {
  color: #4a5568;
}
.inventory-table td:last-child {
  width: 120px;
  text-align: right;
}
.inventory-table a {
  color: #6366f1 !important;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 500;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}
.inventory-table a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
.inventory-table tr:hover { background: #fafbfd; }

/* ── Semester Cards ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.semester-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(360px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 0;
}
@media (max-width: 500px) {
  .semester-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
.semester-card {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.semester-card:hover {
  border-color: #6366f1;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.08);
}
.semester-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; width: 4px; height: 100%;
  background: #6366f1;
}
.semester-card .tag {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: #6366f1;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  display: block;
}
.semester-card h3 {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.semester-card p {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: #5a6369;
  line-height: 1.45;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.semester-card .week-preview {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #94a3b8;
  border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  padding-top: 0.6rem;
  margin: 0;
}

/* ── Timeline SVG ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.timeline-section {
  margin: 2rem 0 0;
}
.timeline-section img {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 8px;
}

/* ── Footer CTA ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.footer-cta {
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 2rem;
}
.footer-cta h2 {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.footer-cta p {
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  margin: 0 0 1.25rem;
}
.footer-cta a {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem;
  border-radius: 7px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  margin: 0 0.25rem;
}
.footer-cta .btn-primary {
  background: #6366f1;
  color: white !important;
}
.footer-cta .btn-primary:hover { background: #818cf8; }
.footer-cta .btn-secondary {
  border: 1.5px solid #e2e8f0;
  color: #4a5568 !important;
}
.footer-cta .btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #6366f1; color: #6366f1 !important; }
</style>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- HERO BAND (title + pillars + numbers — one cohesive unit) -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="hero-band">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-top">
      <div class="hero-text">
        <p class="hero-desc">Everything an instructor needs to teach AI Systems — two semesters of syllabi, interactive labs, a build-from-scratch framework, hardware kits, and a complete assessment system. Open-source and ready to adopt.</p>
        <div class="hero-meta">
          <a href="getting-started.qmd" class="btn-start">Get Started</a>
          <a href="foundations-syllabus.qmd" class="btn-syllabus">View Syllabus</a>
          <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/" class="cc-badge" target="_blank">CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-pillars">
        <div class="hp"><span class="hp-icon">&#x1F4D6;</span><span class="hp-label">Read</span><span class="hp-sub">Textbook</span></div>
        <div class="hp"><span class="hp-icon">&#x1F525;</span><span class="hp-label">Build</span><span class="hp-sub">TinyTorch</span></div>
        <div class="hp"><span class="hp-icon">&#x1F52C;</span><span class="hp-label">Explore</span><span class="hp-sub">Labs</span></div>
        <div class="hp"><span class="hp-icon">&#x1F527;</span><span class="hp-label">Deploy</span><span class="hp-sub">HW Kits</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-numbers">
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">2</span><span class="hn-label">Volumes</span></div>
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">33</span><span class="hn-label">Chapters</span></div>
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">20</span><span class="hn-label">Modules</span></div>
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">32</span><span class="hn-label">Labs</span></div>
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">3</span><span class="hn-label">HW Kits</span></div>
      <div class="hn"><span class="hn-big">600+</span><span class="hn-label">Tests</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="hub-content">

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- CONTENT INVENTORY -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<div class="inv-header">Course Materials</div>
<table class="inventory-table">
  <tr>
    <td>Textbook</td>
    <td>Two volumes: Foundations (1–8 GPUs) and At Scale (distributed fleets). HTML, PDF, EPUB.</td>
    <td><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol1/">Vol I</a> · <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/vol2/">Vol II</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>TinyTorch</td>
    <td>20-module framework students build from scratch — tensors to transformers. 600+ auto-graded tests.</td>
    <td><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/tinytorch/">Browse &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>Interactive Labs</td>
    <td>32 Marimo notebooks powered by <a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/mlsysim/">mlsysim</a>. Browser-based, zero GPU required.</td>
    <td><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/labs/">Browse &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>Hardware Kits</td>
    <td>Arduino Nano 33 BLE, Raspberry Pi + Coral, Seeed XIAO ESP32S3. Optional but powerful.</td>
    <td><a href="https://mlsysbook.ai/kits/">Browse &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
</table>

<div class="inv-header">Teaching Resources</div>
<table class="inventory-table">
  <tr>
    <td>Syllabi</td>
    <td>Week-by-week schedules with linked readings, labs, and assignments for both semesters.</td>
    <td><a href="foundations-syllabus.qmd">Sem 1</a> · <a href="scale-syllabus.qmd">Sem 2</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>Assessment</td>
    <td>Three-tier rubrics, sample student work, AI Olympics capstone spec, grading load estimates.</td>
    <td><a href="assessment.qmd">View &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>Pedagogy</td>
    <td>Prediction Locks, Decision Logs, the A&#8594;B&#8594;C lab structure, and the Iron Law audit framework.</td>
    <td><a href="pedagogy.qmd">View &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>TA Guide</td>
    <td>Grading workflows, common student struggles by week, lab facilitation, office hours protocol.</td>
    <td><a href="ta-guide.qmd">View &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>Customization</td>
    <td>10-week quarter, 3-day workshop, graduate seminar, embedded/cloud emphases.</td>
    <td><a href="customization.qmd">View &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td>FAQ</td>
    <td>Prerequisites, setup, AI tools policy, hardware budgets, and adoption questions.</td>
    <td><a href="faq.qmd">View &rarr;</a></td>
  </tr>
</table>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- SEMESTER TIMELINE + CARDS -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="inv-header">Syllabi</div>

<div class="timeline-section">
  <img src="assets/images/svg/semester-timeline.svg" alt="Two-semester course timeline showing four parts per semester with key milestones.">
</div>

<div class="semester-grid">
  <a href="foundations-syllabus.qmd" class="semester-card">
    <span class="tag">Semester 1 &middot; Volume I</span>
    <h3>AI Systems Foundations</h3>
    <p>From one machine to eight accelerators. Students build TinyTorch from scratch and learn the Iron Law of hardware-software co-design.</p>
    <p class="week-preview">
      Wk 1-4: Physics of AI &middot; Wk 5-8: Building the Stack &middot;
      Wk 9-12: Optimization &middot; Wk 13-16: Production
    </p>
  </a>

  <a href="scale-syllabus.qmd" class="semester-card">
    <span class="tag">Semester 2 &middot; Volume II</span>
    <h3>AI Engineering at Scale</h3>
    <p>From one node to ten thousand. Distributed training, collective communication, and fleet infrastructure for frontier models.</p>
    <p class="week-preview">
      Wk 1-4: The Fleet &middot; Wk 5-8: Distributed Algorithms &middot;
      Wk 9-12: Deployment &middot; Wk 13-16: Governance
    </p>
  </a>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- FOOTER CTA -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="footer-cta">
  <h2>Ready to adopt?</h2>
  <p>Everything is open-source. Start with the getting started guide or jump into a syllabus.</p>
  <a href="getting-started.qmd" class="btn-primary">Get Started</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions" class="btn-secondary">Community</a>
</div>

</div>
```
